retrieved_result: How to Put Pictures on a Flash Drive \"Method1 On Mac1 Plug your flash drive into your Mac. Your computer most likely has rectangular holes, called USB ports, on the sides of its casing (for laptops) or behind the monitor, on the side of the keyboard, or on the CPU for a desktop. You'll insert your flash drive into a USB port. USB ports
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses saving pictures to a flash drive and has no content related to debugging API integrations.
